name: Pricing: 30-Day Supply
usage: Displayed at the top of the 30-day supply pricing card on a dark (#2D2D2D) background. This card is the 'best value' option and should feel premium, abundant, and committed. It contrasts with the minimal 14-day starter card. Displayed at approximately 16:9 landscape, inside a rounded dark card, about 400px wide, 200px tall.
prompt: Multiple zesty supplement shot bottles (5 to 7 visible) arranged in a staggered group formation on a dark charcoal surface. The bottles overlap slightly in depth, creating a layered composition with the front bottle slightly forward and sharpest in focus. Dramatic low-angle studio lighting from behind and below makes the thick opaque golden-yellow liquid inside each bottle glow warmly, creating a beautiful array of golden light through the clear PET plastic. A subtle warm golden haze or flare hovers around the group from the backlighting. The dark surface (#2D2D2D) matches the card background. The bottles cast soft warm reflections on the dark surface below them. The arrangement feels abundant but not chaotic — intentional, like a premium brand display. The overall mood is 'I'm all in. This is my daily commitment.'

scene.background: solid dark charcoal (#2D2D2D), matching the card background
scene.surface: dark charcoal surface, subtle warm reflections from bottle lighting

subject.description: 5 to 7 zesty bottles in a staggered group formation, overlapping in depth, front bottle sharper, thick golden-yellow liquid glowing from backlighting
subject.position: centered group, front bottle slightly forward
subject.angle: low angle, roughly 15 degrees above surface level, looking slightly up at the bottles

camera.depth_of_field: shallow, front bottle sharp, back bottles progressively softer

lighting.direction: from behind and below the bottles, creating glow through the liquid
lighting.shadows: warm reflections on dark surface, golden haze around the group

style: premium product photography, abundance and commitment, luxury fragrance campaign meets wellness brand
negative: no chaotic arrangement, no bright background, no cool tones, no text, no watermarks, no single bottle — must show multiple
